items.name: NeoMatrix
items.description: A rust powered machine learning framework for python

items.name: multi_agent_quote_ai
items.description: The Autonomous Quote Agent system uses a multi-agent AI pipeline to automate insurance processing efficiently. It integrates machine learning, decision systems, and orchestration frameworks to optimize risk assessment, pricing, and conversion. This reduces manual effort while improving accuracy and business outcomes.

items.name: Volve-to-Classroom
items.description: From Data to Pedagogy: A Framework for Integrating the Volve Oilfield Dataset into Data Analytics and Machine Learning for Petroleum Engineering Undergraduate Curriculum

items.name: FSCTEP
items.description: A Multi-Operator Equivariant Framework for High-Performance Machine Learning Force Fields, supporting External Fields embedding and Physical Tensors prediction.

items.name: AIX
items.description: A lean Torch like C++ machine learning framework with multiple device acceleration support.

items.name: MACHINE_LEARNING
items.description: This repository contains all Machine Learning codes and notebooks covered in the Semester 6 curriculum, including fundamental concepts, model implementations, experiments, and practice exercises using Python and popular machine learning frameworks.

items.name: heat
items.description: Distributed tensors and Machine Learning framework with GPU and MPI acceleration in Python

items.name: Seasonal_Flu_Prediction_Analysis
items.description: Machine learning classification project predicting seasonal flu vaccination uptake using the National 2009 H1N1 Flu Survey. Built with scikit-learn following the CRISP-DM framework and adapted for the Kenyan public health context.

items.name: sktime
items.description: A unified framework for machine learning with time series

items.name: digital-twin
items.description: Digital Twin Framework with Integrated Machine Learning for Simulating the Effects of Tillage and Spatiotemporal Straw Return Practices in Rice–Wheat Rotations with Decision Support

items.name: dna-origami-autoencoder
items.description: A groundbreaking "wet-lab ML" framework that encodes 8-bit images into self-assembling DNA origami structures and decodes them using transformer models trained on simulated base-pair kinetics. This project bridges synthetic biology and machine learning to demonstrate information storage and retrieval through biological self-assembly.

items.name: Calorie_Craft_AI-WebApp_2024
items.description: A web application, using Python, Flask Framework, that allows users to predict the calories burnt, using machine learning algorithms, based on physiological and activity data. Outcome: Identified factors most influencing calorie burn and build an accurate model..

items.name: FloodWarn_FloodPrediction_WebApp_2023
items.description: A web app, using Python, Flask Framework, that allows users to predict future floods, using machine learning, based on weather forecast data. Also to visualize current and upcoming floods using Plots, Heat maps and real-time satellite images.

items.name: pyBIA
items.description: Machine learning-based classification framework for detecting spatially extended and diffuse emission in the high redshift universe, using multi-band broadband imaging.

items.name: ONeSAMP_ML
items.description: Machine Learning based framework for estimation of Effective Population Size(Ne) from genetic summary statistics

items.name: seldon-core
items.description: An MLOps framework to package, deploy, monitor and manage thousands of production machine learning models

items.name: RADIAG-chenxl
items.description: A machine-learning diagnostic framework anchors bulk transcriptomic signatures to divergent single-cell endothelial trajectories in rheumatoid arthritis

items.name: QuChaTeR
items.description: The official implementation and source code of "QuChaTeR: A Hybrid Quantum-Chaotic Temporal Framework for Earthquake Prediction", which has been accepted for presentation at the IEEE ICASSP 2026 conference at the Satellite Workshop on Quantum Machine Learning in Signal Processing and Artificial Intelligence.

items.name: social-twins
items.description: A Machine Learning framework for discovering and characterizing scenarios from trajectory datasets into different interaction types by combining state-of-the-art trajectory forecasting and embedding quantization techniques.

items.name: Trustworthy-AI-Framework
items.description: This project aims to evaluate and improve the reliability of machine learning models across three key dimensions: - Fairness - Robustness - Privacy

items.name: nanocomposite_machine_learning
items.description: This project presents a computational framework for analyzing ternary and binary nanocomposite systems based on ZnO, CuO, and CoO for photocatalytic dye degradation studies.

items.name: Chaos-Kitten-Data-Science-Universe
items.description: Chaos Kitten Data Science Universe — a behavioral taxonomy framework that models telecom customer interaction patterns using gamified archetypes designed for human training, analytics, and machine learning applications.

items.name: MOSFET_Simulation
items.description: This repository provides a Python-based framework to simulate realistic MOSFET I-V characteristics and generate challenging datasets for machine learning experiments. It models Healthy, Degraded, and Failed MOSFETs with realistic noise, variability, and non-ideal effects, making it ideal for testing ML algorithms for device health classification.

items.name: atlas-dataflow
items.description: Atlas DataFlow é um framework contrato-driven para construção de pipelines analíticos modulares, auditáveis e adaptáveis. Organiza o fluxo de dados em etapas orientadas a domínio, promovendo rastreabilidade, reprodutibilidade e integração consistente entre análise de dados, modelagem estatística e aplicações de machine learning.

items.name: cloud-metrics-predictive-alerting
items.description: Implement a model that predicts whether an incident will occur within the next H time steps based on the previous W steps of one or more time-series metrics. Use a sliding-window formulation and train the model using any standard machine-learning framework.

items.name: MolMiR-1
items.description: Machine learning framework for molecular miRNA target prediction

items.name: MolBench
items.description: Molecular machine learning benchmarking framework

items.name: upstack
items.description: An open-source framework that configures AI as a genuine tutor — not an answer machine.

items.name: used-car-price-prediction-crispdm
items.description: Analysis and prediction of used car prices using machine learning models following the CRISP-DM framework.

items.name: linfa
items.description: A Rust machine learning framework.

items.name: apax
items.description: A flexible and performant framework for training machine learning potentials.

items.name: finstream-metaopt
items.description: Implementation of an adaptive machine learning system for non-stationary financial data streams. The framework combines temporally diverse ensemble models with meta-heuristic optimization to dynamically adjust model influence under concept drift.

items.name: ML-Framework
items.description: A bare-metal, dependency-free Machine Learning framework written in C and Assembly. Features static memory arenas, reverse-mode Autograd, SIMD (AVX2/NEON) optimizations, and INT8 quantization for edge and TinyML environments.

items.name: Materials-ML-Framework
items.description: Research framework for machine learning and materials science

items.name: Crime-Pattern-Analysis-and-Arrest-Prediction
items.description: Developed an analytical and predictive framework to identify crime patterns and forecast arrest outcomes using machine learning.

items.name: nova
items.description: NOVA is a tool for annotating and analyzing behaviours in social interactions. It supports Annotators using Machine Learning already during the coding process. Further it features both, discrete labels and continuous scores and a visuzalization of streams recorded with the SSI Framework.

items.name: Federated-Learning-Simulation
items.description: A simulation framework for federated learning experiments, allowing researchers to test and evaluate privacy-preserving machine learning algorithms on decentralized datasets.

items.name: Data-Analysis-Project---Dropout-Students
items.description: Applied causal machine learning and statistical analysis within a DAG-based framework to evaluate the effect of treatment (scholarship) on the outcome (student dropout). Demonstrated the causal impact of financial support on reducing dropout and uncovered heterogeneous treatment effects.

items.name: transaction-cost-trap
items.description: Replication code for: Beyond Directional Accuracy — An Economic Feasibility Framework for Machine Learning Trading Strategies Under Realistic Market Frictions. Under review at Expert Systems with Applications.

items.name: anvil
items.description: Anvil is a high-performance machine learning framework written in Rust, designed from the ground up for speed, parallelism, and control.

items.name: kmeans_nn_ILF_london_smart_meters
items.description: Kmeans-NN method for Individual Load Forecasting and online fault detection in smart meters, following the article: Tayseer, M., Talaat, M., Zamel, A.A. et al. "Cyber-resilient machine learning framework for accurate individual load forecasting and anomaly detection in smart grids", Nature, December 2025.

items.name: Interpretable-Machine-Learning-and-Counterfactual-Scenario-Analysis-for-HIV-Mortality-Risk
items.description: This study applies an interpretable machine learning framework combined with scenario-based analysis to identify and explain key determinants of HIV mortality risk across countries.

items.name: predicting-engagement-success-ml
items.description: Machine learning project that predicts social media engagement success using early persuasion signals, influencer authority, and algorithmic amplification in a two-stage framework.

items.name: ML-use-to-predict-bulk-modulus-of-a-material
items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting bulk modulus of inorganic materials using RF, SVR, GBR, XGBoost, and CatBoost. Integrates Matminer/Pymatgen features, SHAP interpretability, and GPAW-based DFT validation, enabling accurate, scalable, and cost-effective materials property prediction.

items.name: masfi
items.description: Mapping Alternate Scenarios of Forest Intactness (MASFI) is a cloud-based machine learning framework. It uses XGBoost regression and remote sensing data such as GEDI LiDAR to create high-resolution maps and statistics, supporting protected area planning and management.

items.name: Covid-19
items.description: It is a basic project which fetches data from various live resources, which integrates data analyzed using python/machine-learning & converted into a webpage using charts & Django-framework, where user can check the impact of COVID-19 on different countries. The project aims at real-time COVID-19 data analysis, recovery rate/death rate prediction, and AI-powered smart chatbot using Machine Learning techniques.

items.name: HLSFactory
items.description: HLSFactory: A Framework Empowering High-Level Synthesis Datasets for Machine Learning and Beyond

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

items.name: Weather-Predictor
items.description: The proposed system introduces a machine learning-based framework for accurate weather prediction, designed to overcome the limitations of traditional forecasting methods. The system focuses on predicting temperature, rainfall, and humidity using historical weather data from NOAA

items.name: OmniRank
items.description: A comprehensive ranking and evaluation framework for machine learning models and algorithms

items.name: medsync
items.description: Building a machine learning framework that allows hospitals to collaboratively train models without sharing sensitive patient data.

items.name: Monte-Carlo-Stock-Price-Predictor
items.description: An advanced Monte Carlo simulation framework for stock price prediction with machine learning-enhanced volatility modeling and multiple stochastic processes.

items.name: IoT-496-C-ML-Framework
items.description: Machine Learning runtime implementation in C to run Tensorflow models on a Raspberry Pi Pico 2

items.name: ML_Algorithms_From_Scratch
items.description: A growing collection of fundamental Machine Learning algorithms implemented completely from scratch using Python and `numpy`. This repository serves as an educational resource to understand the inner workings of various ML models without relying on high-level frameworks like scikit-learn for the core logic.

items.name: Proyecto_Kedro
items.description: Repositorio dedicado a almacenar mi primer Framework de Kedro para Machine Learning

items.name: MILP_GNN
items.description: MILP_GNN is a Python research codebase for learning branching strategies in Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) using machine learning. The project implements graph convolutional neural networks and multilayer perceptrons to predict effective branching variables within a branch-and-bound solver framework.

items.name: EnergyTradingProject
items.description: This repository provides a complete end-to-end framework for forecasting hourly intraday electricity prices on the Iberian market and converting these forecasts into systematic trading strategies. The project integrates data engineering, advanced machine-learning models, hyperparameter optimisation, and algorithmic trading mechanisms.

items.name: quantum
items.description: An open-source Python framework for hybrid quantum-classical machine learning.

items.name: APT_Manuscript_Script
items.description: A Machine Learning/Deep Learning framework for detecting Advanced Persistent Threats (APTs) using CSE-CIC-IDS2018 & CIC-IDS2017 dataset. Features data preprocessing, feature engineering, and ensemble model evaluation in a Jupyter environment.

items.name: merlin
items.description: Photonic Quantum Machine Learning Framework

items.name: Hybrid-AI-Framework-for-Predicting-Future-Suicide-Rates-Integrating-ML-and-Time-Series-Analysis
items.description: A novel framework combining machine learning and time series analysis to forecast future suicide rates effectively across different regions.

items.name: Fair-TOPSIS
items.description: A Python framework for selecting fair and accurate Machine Learning models using Pareto Frontier and TOPSIS multicriteria decision-making, supporting various normalization techniques.

items.name: mGFD_EcoRisk_Simulator
items.description: Advanced framework combining 2D contaminant transport simulation (advection–diffusion) with machine learning to classify ecological risk (Low/Medium/High) and generate dashboards, GIFs, and reports.

items.name: Diabetes-Complication-Risk-Prediction-Model
items.description: A machine learning project that predicts diabetes-related complications such as cardiovascular disease, kidney disease, and neuropathy using patient clinical data. The project includes data cleaning, preprocessing, feature engineering, exploratory data analysis, and a multi-label classification framework.

items.name: AgML
items.description: AgML is a centralized framework for agricultural machine learning. AgML provides access to public agricultural datasets for common agricultural deep learning tasks, with standard benchmarks and pretrained models, as well the ability to generate synthetic data and annotations.

items.name: Streamlit.app
items.description: This application is built using Streamlit, a powerful Python framework for creating interactive web applications for data science and machine learning projects.  The app runs locally at http://localhost:8501/  and provides a user-friendly interface to interact with data, models, or visualizations without requiring any frontend development.

items.name: epidemiological-anomaly-detection
items.description: Machine Learning framework for early detection of epidemiological anomalies and geospatial risk analysis.

items.name: NetGuard
items.description: An Explainable Machine Learning-Based Framework for Fault Prediction and Isolation in Telecommunication Networks

items.name: predictive-analytics-qa-medical-devices
items.description: A literature review exploring predictive analytics, machine learning, data quality frameworks, and ethical considerations in medical device quality assurance.

items.name: ml-model-serving-rust
items.description: A high-performance, low-latency machine learning model serving framework built in Rust.

items.name: LiS-solvation-MLIP
items.description: Universal machine learning framework for lithium-sulfur battery electrolyte solvation dynamics with experimental validation via Raman and PFG-NMR spectroscopy

items.name: framework-ml
items.description: Framework de Machine Learning : Apprentissage et Exercice – Cadre Académique

items.name: folax
items.description: Folax (Finite Operator Learning with JAX) is a framework for solving and optimizing PDEs by integrating machine learning with numerical methods in computational mechanics.

items.name: paxml
items.description: Pax is a Jax-based machine learning framework for training large scale models. Pax allows for advanced and fully configurable experimentation and parallelization, and has demonstrated industry leading model flop utilization rates.

items.name: Physics-guided-ANN-Kriging-hybrid-model
items.description: A data‑driven machine‑learning framework to address a previously unresolved problem in multi‑hazard bridge engineering. Accurate prediction of rockfall impact force profiles on RC two‑column bents that have already sustained earthquake‑induced damage.

items.name: vishuml-docs
items.description: VishuML is a comprehensive machine learning library implementing fundamental algorithms from scratch in Python. This library provides educational implementations of popular ML algorithms without relying on external ML frameworks like scikit-learn

items.name: Apple-dev-session-Foundation-Models-and-AI-frameworks
items.description: Enhance your apps with the Foundation Models and machine learning frameworks

items.name: DetaNet-MD
items.description: A universal machine learning force field framework

items.name: transformers
items.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

items.name: Near-Infrared-Spectroscopy
items.description: This repository contains the complete analytical pipeline for a study on fish freshness classification. The analysis leverages advanced machine learning methods implemented within the mlr3 framework, enabling robust model training, evaluation, and comparison.

items.name: odt-prediction-ml
items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting aqueous odor detection thresholds and identifying high-potency food odorants

items.name: Agentic-AI-Fraud-Investigation-System
items.description: Agentic AI framework for fraud investigation combining machine learning fraud detection with multi-agent reasoning for risk analysis, control gap identification, and audit recommendations.

items.name: BreatheLight
items.description: Mind Monitor AI is a machine learning framework designed to detect early indicators of depression, anxiety, and psychological distress within social media text using Natural Language Processing and sentiment analysis.

items.name: Project-Portfolio
items.description: This repository serves as a portfolio of my data science and machine learning work, featuring projects that span exploratory data analysis, predictive modeling, and data visualization. Each project reflects my growth as a learner and my hands-on approach to applying concepts from statistics, Python, and modern ML frameworks to real-world problems.

items.name: Implement-and-Manage-Zero-Trust-Network-Access
items.description: AI-Enhanced User Protection (AIUP) is a next-generation security framework that leverages artificial intelligence and machine learning to verify user identities and protect online platforms from cyber threats

items.name: personal-finance-analytics
items.description: A data-driven personal finance analytics system that calculates income tax liability under the Indian tax framework, assesses financial health using key indicators, and predicts financial stress levels with explainable insights. Built as an educational decision-support tool using Python, FastAPI, and machine learning techniques.

items.name: mGFD_Skin_Diffusion_Simulator
items.description: Open-source framework for transient 2D diffusion modeling in skin-like domains using the Generalized Finite Differences Method, featuring mesh libraries, visualization outputs, and large-scale dataset generation for machine learning and parameter studies.

items.name: data-engineering-analytics-portfolio
items.description: Enterprise-style data engineering and analytics projects demonstrating scalable pipelines, SQL analytics, machine learning, and governance frameworks.

items.name: AI2026
items.description: An end-to-end technical repository featuring hands-on notebooks across the full AI stack: Statistics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, GenAI, and Agentic frameworks. Focused on 2026 industry standards, this collection bridges the gap between fundamental revision and experimental AI development.

items.name: leakage-free-diabetes-risk-prediction
items.description: Leakage-free Machine Learning Framework for Diabetes Risk Prediction

items.name: sundial
items.description: Workflow / framework for machine learning with data sourced from Google Earth Engine on a bare metal machine.

items.name: TorchIsAllYouNeed
items.description: PyTorch Framework Imitation for Machine Learning Course

items.name: backpas
items.description: BackPAS is a framework that integrates Machine Learning into the solution process of optimization problems, using a predict-and-search approach for Pseudo-Boolean Optimization (PBO) instances with backbone training

items.name: AcuteLeukemia
items.description: Machine learning framework for early detection of major bleeding in acute leukemia using temporal laboratory features and cross-dataset validation. Includes preprocessing, model training, evaluation, and visualization pipelines.

items.name: vibrolearn
items.description: A Python framework for machine learning experiments in industrial machinery fault diagnosis through vibration analysis.

items.name: caretSDM
items.description: caretSDM applies a geoprocessing framework to the caret machine learning package, facilitating the access of Species Distribution Modeling community to state-of-the-art methods.
